title: 「文宣入黎拆」有線：灣仔有人被圍毆  傷勢嚴重

#有視電視 #灣仔 #黑衣 #藍衣 #圍毆

https://www.facebook.com/186040714921338/posts/1211547525703980?sfns=mo

個人唔反對私了，但好多和理非未接受到。仲有如果我地打死對家只會送個大文宣核單俾佢地。最緊要係對國際文宣可能好不利。

我地要focus係twitter/reddit/facebook/ig 解釋點解要私了:係因為黑警選擇性執法，只針對年輕人，放生廢老。

仲有好似全民勇武巴咁講，我地唔好打頭，打死佢只益左佢，俾佢地感受下新屋嶺手足既痛楚好啦（https://lih.kg/1572274）

The pro-China triads had harmed the citizen so many times without being arrested, we have to fight back.
7.21 Yuen Long MTR station, more than 100 gangsters attacked MTR passengers, causing more than 45 injured. After 2 months, 30 of them are arrested, and only 2 are charged [1]. (Compare: More than 1100 protester arrested; more than 130 of them charged)
Many pro-democracy citizens near Lennon wall being attacked, a female was stabbed to critical condition [2].
The Fujian triads attack citizens, police did not arrest them at the scene [3]. They brought knifes and sticks to the street and search for protesters to attack, police did not stop and search [4]. Today they also tried to attack protesters, and still, police did not arrest them [5,6].
Obviously HKPF is biased. If you support police, you can break the laws without being arrested.

Since the police is not fair, the only way to protect ourselves is to fight back. The trust of HKPF lost from 7.21, when they acquiesced the triads to attack citizens.

[1] https://www.hongkongfp.com/2019/08/22/breaking-two-men-charged-rioting-mob-attack-yuen-long-last-month/
[2] https://www.hongkongfp.com/2019/08/20/26-year-old-hong-kong-woman-critical-condition-knife-attack-lennon-wall-tseung-kwan-o/
